title: Assign tasks to fictitious employees
excerpt:
It would be great if I could create a resource, but not actually create an account for them.  I could them assign them tasks and see them in the resource allocation chart.

posts.author: sbentley (Shane Bentley)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if I could create a resource, but not actually create an account for them. I could them assign them tasks and see them in the resource allocation chart.
I can then use this information and take it to management to show the need to employ additional people.
